name: Yemen
region: Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan & Pakistan

news.title: WHO Yemen: WHO strengthens trauma and nutrition care in Yemen’s high-risk districts with support from ECHO
news.summary: WHO scaled trauma and nutrition services in high-risk districts as conflict and air strikes continued to strain Yemen’s health system.

news.title: As the crisis in Yemen deepens, aid agencies appeal for $2.5 billion for the humanitarian response in 2025
news.summary: The United Nations launched the 2025 Yemen Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan amid continued economic decline and food insecurity.

analysis.summary: Yemen shows very weak economic momentum with GDP growth at -1.5%. Inflation remains elevated at 20.4%. Unemployment stands at 17.3%. Overall signals for the short-term outlook are mixed.
